workshoptitle: READ-ONLY PDB users in Oracle 26ai - Secure Multitenancy

tutorials.title: READ-ONLY PDB users in Oracle 26ai - Secure Multitenancy
tutorials.description: Learn how to strengthen security in Oracle Database 23ai with the new READ-ONLY PDB user feature. In this short course, you’ll discover how to provide secure, query-only access to Pluggable Databases, prevent all DDL and DML operations, and protect data integrity using the READ ONLY clause in the CREATE USER statement—ideal for modern multitenant environments.
